name: Phoenix Pawn
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Sun City, AZ specializing in gold jewelry, firearms, and collateral-based loans since 2009. Offers on-site jewelry repair and flat-rate gun transfers.
description_long:
Phoenix Pawn opened its doors on November 1, 2009, and has been operating as a family-owned business in the West Valley of Phoenix for 15 years under the ownership of George and his wife. Located at 9010 North 103rd Avenue in Sun City near the University of Phoenix Stadium and Westgate Entertainment District, the shop has built a reputation centered on honesty, fairness, and customer respect within the local community.

The company offers a diverse range of services centered around jewelry and firearms. Their jewelry inventory includes gold, silver, rings, bracelets, watches, diamonds, chains, and vintage pieces. They provide on-site jewelry repair, stone replacement, engraving, and custom jewelry design. The shop also buys, sells, and transfers firearms, with a signature offering of flat $25 gun transfers—described on their website as "the only flat rate in town." Additionally, they buy motorcycles, gold, and silver as collateral or outright purchases.

Phoenix Pawn distinguishes itself through specialized expertise and personalized service. George provides knowledgeable guidance on loans, purchases, jewelry, and firearms. Jim, their master jewelry repair technician, brings over 35 years of experience and was formerly employed at Zales, specializing in jewelry repair, redesign, and watch repair. The business offers free jewelry cleaning for customers, which adds value beyond typical pawn shop transactions.

The shop operates on a limited schedule (Tuesday-Saturday, closed Sunday-Monday) and maintains moderate hours that may not suit all customers. While the website emphasizes their gun transfer pricing advantage, typical pawn shop limitations apply—collateral-based loans often carry high interest rates, and the range of financial products is limited compared to alternative lending options. Their narrow geographic location in Sun City serves primarily West Phoenix residents.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Flat $25 gun transfer rate described as "the only flat rate in town" — significantly lower than typical $50-150 transfer fees
On-site master jewelry repair with 35+ years of experience (former Zales jeweler) — avoids need to find external repair services
Free jewelry cleaning service for all customers
15-year operating history with emphasis on honesty and fairness in community
Diverse collateral acceptance including motorcycles, gold, silver, jewelry, and firearms
Custom jewelry design and stone replacement services available
Knowledgeable owner (George) provides guidance on loans and valuations
cons: Very limited operating hours (closed Sunday-Monday; weekday hours 10am-6pm max) restrict access for working adults
Geographically isolated to Sun City/West Phoenix area — inconvenient for East Valley or central Phoenix residents
No information provided about loan terms, interest rates, or APR — typical pawn shop concern for affordability
Website lacks transparency on how loan values are determined or what collateral ratios apply
Limited financial product offerings compared to alternative lenders or traditional credit products
best_for: West Phoenix/Sun City residents needing quick collateral-based loans or gun transfers
Jewelry owners seeking repair services from an experienced craftsperson without external vendor searches
Firearms buyers looking for lower-cost gun transfer services
Gold and silver sellers in the local market
diagnosis: Phoenix Pawn is best suited for West Phoenix/Sun City residents who need quick collateral-based loans or have jewelry in need of professional repair, particularly those seeking their competitive gun transfer rates. The main caveat is the limited operating hours and geographic isolation, combined with typical pawn shop limitations on loan transparency and affordability—borrowers should confirm interest rates before pledging collateral, as rates are not disclosed on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
